title: stelis minima
intro: Stelis minima, a type of orchid species, is native to South America and belongs to the family Orchidaceae, characterized by its small and delicate flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis minima include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
